funFacts: The classic Ford Mustang is highly prized by collectors for its aggressive look, dual exhaust pipes, and competition suspension.
The Ford Mustang Mach 1 was a legendary muscle car powered by a Cobra Jet V8 engine producing up to 335 horsepower.
